Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Continued To Jun-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Schneider, via ZOOM, counsel for Evelyn Lee and Yvonne Lee, co-Executors.

The court queries counsel regarding the status of a petition to close this estate. Counsel reports that a Petition for Final Distribution has been forwarded to the court for filing. The court confirms that a Petition in this matter is currently pending review in the e-filing queue. The court then advises counsel to follow-up on Examiner notes and tentative rulings in this matter.

After brief discussion, the Status Hearing is taken off-calendar and the Status on Close of Estate is continued to June 1, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-30-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that the petition is word for word the same as a petition that was filed in 2019 which indicates that nothing has happened, that no new information has been provided, and that this petition for approval of status of administration is unacceptable and is off calendar. The Court sets a new status on close of estate for May 11, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executors Evelyn Lee and Yvonne Lee, and the Attorney Daniel Schneider to appear on May 11, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they have failed to file an adequate petition.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-23-2021 Continued To Mar-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-02-2021 Continued To Feb-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-29-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-29-2020 Continued To Oct-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Schneider appeared by zoom for and with Evelyn Lee by zoom and Yvonne Lee by zoom (Executors).

The Court stated that this estate is four years old, that two years ago the Parties were told by Judge Busch that this estate needed to be closed, and that there is no petition for final distribution. Mr. Schneider apologized to the Court for not appearing at the last hearing stating that it was miscalendared for December instead of September. Mr. Schneider also stated that he filed a status report last week, that they are in the same position with the ancillary proceeding, that the property is in Hong Kong, that nothing can be done due to the COVID pandemic and the political unrest going on in Hong Kong, and that their hands are tied. In addition, Mr. Schneider stated that he tried to e-file the report, that he had trouble at his end with the e-filing process and that he mailed the report to the Court last week. Status on close of estate is continued to October 27, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-08-2020 Continued To Sep-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Co-Executors Evelyn Lee and Yvonne Lee, and the Attorney Daniel Schneider to appear on September 29, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-04-2018 Continued To Oct-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that this matter is overdue for a petition to close the estate and stated that an Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the Executors to appear on October 2, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why there was no appearance today and why the petition has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Wu. (Not Reported)
